rulings.Case Title: ROBERT JAMES HANSON VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 4, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Blue Diamond Growers' motion for summary judgment: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY MARQUEZ VS. PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pac Operating Limited Partnerships Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 4, 2015 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's motion to strike portions of plaintiff's complaint is continued on the court's own motion to June 10, 2015. = (503/TLJ)
